NotFound.title: Page not found
NotFound.body: We could not find what you were looking for.

Nav.searchPlaceholder: What are you looking for? e.g. apartment, iPhone, VW?

Chat.title: Conversation
Chat.inboxSubtitle: Your conversations with buyers and sellers.
Chat.inboxEmpty: Open a listing and tap ?Contact seller? to start.
Chat.emptyThread: Send the first message ? replies appear here in real time.
Chat.loadError: We couldn’t load chat data. Please try again in a moment.

Contact.metaDescription: Email us or open live chat with our team for account help and questions about the platform.
Contact.pageSubtitle: Live chat and email in one place — pick what works for you; we reply as soon as we can.
Contact.title: Contact
Contact.subtitle: Pick the channel that works for you — we reply as soon as we can during business hours.
Contact.emailSupportBody: Account issues, sign-in, blocked listings, or errors on the site.
Contact.emailGeneralBody: Partnerships, press, and other requests that aren’t technical support.
Contact.regionNote: Our team is based in Moldova; response times may vary on weekends and holidays.

feedback.title: Feedback & suggestions
feedback.placeholder: Tell us what we can improve…
feedback.emailPlaceholder: If you are not signed in, leave an email for a reply
feedback.accountLead: Tell us what we can improve — we read every message and reply in your notifications.

Support.contactSectionLead: Fast answers in chat, without leaving the site. For account, payments, or urgent issues.
Support.contactSectionHintPrivacy: Conversations are confidential — handled by VEX support.
Support.contactSectionHintAuth: You need to be signed in to use chat.
Support.emptyThread: Tell us briefly how we can help — a team member will reply here.
Support.hintEnter: Enter to send · Shift+Enter for new line
Support.sendError: We couldn’t send your message. Try again.
Support.ticketLoadError: Live support isn’t available right now (database not migrated or service unavailable). Try again or email us.
Support.feedbackBody: Before closing the ticket, please leave a quick rating.
Support.feedbackThanks: Thank you! Your feedback was sent.
Support.feedbackError: We couldn't save your feedback. Try again.
Support.feedbackValidationError: Please choose a star rating and satisfaction.
Support.systemTicketRegistered:
💬 Your ticket was registered successfully.
A moderator will reply as soon as possible, depending on availability.
Support.moderatorJoinedBanner: 🟢 A moderator has joined the conversation.

Home.title: A local marketplace for classifieds and sales
Home.subtitle: Cars, real estate, electronics, and services ? in one place. Post for free or find what you need fast.
Home.exploreSubtitle: Pick a topic ? filters apply to the listing page automatically.
Home.how1Body: Browse by category and city, or sign in and publish an ad in minutes.
Home.how2Body: You deal directly with the other party ? phone or details in the ad; no mandatory platform fee.
Home.how3Body: Listings follow community rules; abusive content can be removed (admin tools evolve over time).
Home.trust1Body: Clear filters, prices in MDL or EUR (configurable), and structured fields by category.
Home.trust2Body: Guided posting, multiple images, and visibility in the feed ? great for quick local sales.
Home.trust3Body: Fast UI for desktop and mobile, with multi-language support.
Home.ctaSubtitle: Open the feed or post your first ad ? it only takes a few minutes.

marketplace.banner: Welcome to VEX ? local classifieds, quick and simple.
marketplace.heroSubheadline: The free classifieds platform for Moldova
marketplace.trustPillarFreeDesc: Post and browse with no hidden commissions.
marketplace.trustPillarFastDesc: Find or sell in minutes, from any device.
marketplace.trustPillarSafeDesc: Verified accounts, in-app messages, and clear community rules.
marketplace.trustPillarSupportDesc: Help and guides so you get the most out of VEX.
marketplace.emptyHint: Use the orange “+” button in the bottom bar to post the first listing.
marketplace.promoBrowseCardBody: Filter by category, price, and location — find exactly what you need.
marketplace.categoriesHint: Pick a topic ? listings open with filters applied.
marketplace.empty: No listings yet. Be the first to post!
marketplace.promoTile1Body: Enter what you need and optionally a city — then refine by category and price in the listings.
marketplace.heroExamples: e.g. cars, phones, rent — contact by phone.
marketplace.promoTile2Body: Message sellers right from the listing.
marketplace.promoTile3Body: Post with photos and structured category fields.
marketplace.promo2Body: Create an account and add your ad in minutes ? with photos and clear details.

Footer.tagline: Local classifieds marketplace in Moldova — connecting buyers and sellers quickly and safely.
Footer.colContactIntro: Reach us for account help, technical issues, or general questions.
Footer.colHelpIntro: Guides to post ads, browse listings, and manage your account.
Footer.colSafetyIntro: Rules, safer payments, and reporting — a better community for everyone.
Footer.disclaimer: VEX lists ads between users and is not a party to your deals. Verify the item or service before paying.

InfoArticle.hubHelpIntro: Guides on using the platform, posting ads, contacting sellers, and managing your account.
InfoArticle.hubSafetyIntro: Practical anti-fraud rules, spotting scams, and reporting suspicious listings.

howItWorks.metaDescription: How to use VEX — local classifieds in Moldova.
howItWorks.title: How VEX works
howItWorks.p1: Sign in or create an account, pick the right category, and publish your ad with photos and details. Buyers can reach you via on-site messages.
howItWorks.p2: Posting standard ads is usually free; check the Terms for the latest rules.
howItWorks.p3: Account or technical issues: asistenta@vex.md. Partnerships: contact@vex.md.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.q1: How much does it cost to post?
faq.a1: Posting is generally free for regular users; see the Terms for exceptions.
faq.a2: Through messaging when signed in, or via details you choose to show (e.g. phone).
faq.q3: How do I delete my account or data?
faq.a3: From account settings and the Data deletion page (GDPR). Help: asistenta@vex.md.

antiFraud.metaDescription: Stay safe when buying or selling on VEX.
antiFraud.title: Anti-fraud tips
antiFraud.intro: Keep these rules in mind when dealing with strangers:
antiFraud.tip1: Prefer local meet-ups for goods and inspect before you pay.
antiFraud.tip2: Avoid upfront payments to people you have not verified.
antiFraud.tip3: Do not send SMS codes, passwords, or bank details in chat.
antiFraud.tip4: Suspicious ad? Use “Report” on the listing page.
antiFraud.tip5: Prices far below market or pressure to decide fast are red flags.
antiFraud.outro: If you encounter fraud attempts, keep screenshots and email asistenta@vex.md.

cookies.metaDescription: How we use cookies on VEX.
cookies.title: Cookie policy
cookies.p1: We may use cookies required for the site to work (session, sign-in, security) and, where applicable, preferences or aggregated analytics.
cookies.p2: You can control cookies in your browser; blocking some may affect features (e.g. staying signed in).
cookies.p3: For personal data tied to your account, see the Privacy policy and Data deletion page.

reportAd.metaDescription: How to report a suspicious or abusive listing on VEX.
reportAd.title: Report a listing
reportAd.p1: Open the listing and click “Report”. Choose a reason and add details if needed — moderators may act according to platform rules.
reportAd.p2: You need to be signed in to send a report from the listing page.

document.ackPrefix: I have read and agree to the

termeni.languageNote: The complete legal text below is provided in Romanian (official version for VEX / vex.md).

confidentialitate.languageNote: The complete legal text below is provided in Romanian (official version for VEX / vex.md).

stergere.languageNote: The complete legal text below is provided in Romanian (official version for VEX / vex.md).

terms.title: Terms of service
terms.p1: By accessing and using this site you agree to these terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.p2: You are responsible for your listings: accuracy of information, rights to images, and compliance with the law. We may remove or moderate listings that break the rules or the law.
terms.p3: The site is provided as a technical intermediary between users. We do not guarantee uninterrupted availability and are not a party to transactions between users. Disputes about goods or services are between the parties.
terms.p4: We may update these terms; the version published on the site is the reference. Continued use after changes means you accept the new terms.
terms.p5: Where applicable, EU/EEA consumer and data-protection rules apply.
terms.p6: For questions about these terms, use the site operator?s published contact details (replace with production contacts).

privacy.title: Privacy policy
privacy.p1: We process personal data (e.g. email when you create an account) to provide authentication, listing features, and technical operation.
privacy.p2: Processing may rely on contract performance (account), legitimate interests (security, abuse prevention), or consent where required.
privacy.p3: We retain data as long as needed for these purposes or as required by law. You may request access, rectification, erasure, or restriction where applicable.
privacy.p4: We may use technical subprocessors (hosting, transactional email) who process data on our behalf with appropriate safeguards.
privacy.p5: Cookies: we use essential cookies for sessions and core functionality. If you add optional analytics, show a banner and document user choices.
privacy.p6: To exercise GDPR rights or ask about data, contact the site operator at the published address (replace with a real email in production).

Listings.title: Listings
Listings.subtitle: Find the right listings quickly and filter by what matters most.
Listings.browseLoadError: We couldn’t load listings from the database. Your ads are usually still saved — check server logs and Prisma/DB connectivity, then reload.
Listings.cardNoImageHint: Upload a photo when you edit the ad

ListingDetail.favoritesHint: Save this ad to find it quickly later.
ListingDetail.favoritesLogin: You need an account to save ads. Sign in and come back to this page.
ListingDetail.ownerDeleteConfirm: Delete this listing permanently? This cannot be undone.
ListingDetail.ownerDeleteLogin: Sign in to manage your listing.

Auth.cardSubtitle: Sign in or create an account to continue.
Auth.identifierHint: Use the email you registered with, or your phone number (digits only).
Auth.termsRequired: You must accept the terms to continue.
Auth.passwordWeak: Password does not meet all requirements.
Auth.loginLead: Welcome back. Use Google, Facebook, or your email.
Auth.registerLead: New here? It only takes a minute.
Auth.phoneHint: At least 8 digits; spaces and symbols are ignored.
Auth.phoneInvalid: Enter a valid phone number (at least 8 digits).
Auth.invalidPassword: Password must be at least 8 characters.
Auth.oauthConfigureHint: OAuth (Google / Facebook) appears here after you add credentials in .env ? see .env.example.
Auth.registerSuccess: Account created. You can sign in now.
Auth.registerConfirmEmail: Almost done — open the confirmation link we sent to your email, then sign in. If you don’t see it, check spam.
Auth.confirmEmailHeadline: 📩 We’ve sent a confirmation email. Check your inbox to activate your account.
Auth.confirmEmailSpamHint: If you don’t see it, check Spam or Promotions.
Auth.resendConfirmError: Couldn’t resend the email. Try again later.
Auth.loginInvalid: Incorrect email or password. Check and try again.
Auth.loginEmailNotConfirmed: Confirm your email first (link in your inbox). Until then, password sign-in won’t work.
Auth.loginRateLimited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
Auth.forgotSubtitle: Enter your account email. If it exists and has a password, you will receive a link (valid for 1 hour).
Auth.resetEmailSent: If an account exists for this email, we sent instructions.
Auth.resetEmailSentHint: 📩 If your email is registered, you will receive a reset link (check spam, too).
Auth.resetMailNotConfigured: Password reset is unavailable: set NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_URL and NEXT_PUBLIC_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY.
Auth.resetSendFailed: Could not send the email. Try again later.
Auth.resetOAuthHint: If you signed up with Google or Facebook, use that button ? there is no separate password.
Auth.resetSubtitle: Choose a new password (at least 8 characters).
Auth.resetInvalidToken: Invalid or expired link. Request a new one.
Auth.resetExpired: This link expired. Request a new one from Forgot password.
Auth.resetPasswordSuccess: Password updated. You can sign in.
Auth.resetNoRecoverySession: Open the reset link from your email on this device, or request a new link below.
Auth.resetUpdateFailed: Could not update the password. Try again or request a new reset link.
Auth.callbackError_missing_code: The sign-in link is invalid or expired. Please try again.
Auth.callbackError_oauth: Google/Facebook sign-in failed. Try again or use email and password.
Auth.callbackError_supabase_env: Sign-in is not configured correctly. Try again later or contact support.
Auth.callbackError_generic: Sign-in could not be completed. Please try again.

Account.title: Account
Account.subtitle: Sign in or create an account.
Account.profileSubtitle: Fill in your basics and profile photo.
Account.profileValidation: Please check your input (for example, avatar URL must start with http/https).
Account.profileUnknown: Could not save profile. Try again.

AccountHub.myListingsSubtitle: All listings you’ve published on VEX.
AccountHub.myListingsEmpty: You don’t have any listings yet.
AccountHub.myListingDeleteConfirm: Delete this listing permanently? This cannot be undone.
AccountHub.myListingDeleteLogin: Sign in to manage your listings.

TesterChat.title: Tester chat
TesterChat.subtitle: Talk in real time with other testers.
TesterChat.onlineEmpty: No one appears online yet (open the chat in another tab to test).
TesterChat.rule2: Report bugs clearly in the dedicated panel.
TesterChat.rule3: Do not post personal or sensitive information.
TesterChat.supabaseMissing: Chat is unavailable: Supabase public env vars are missing.
TesterChat.loadError: Could not load messages. Try again.
TesterChat.sendError: Could not send the message. Check your connection and permissions.
TesterChat.trialReadOnly: Your tester level is “beginner”: you can read the chat. An admin can raise your level so you can write messages.
TesterChat.deleteError: Could not delete the message (check your tester level or permissions).
TesterChat.deleteErrorForbidden: You are not allowed to delete messages (tester level or role).

Notifications.title: Notifications
Notifications.subtitle: Updates from moderators about your reports.

ReportOther.pageSubtitle: Choose whether you are reporting a listing or a technical issue on the site.
ReportOther.introListing: Briefly describe the issue and include the listing URL so we can find it quickly.
ReportOther.introSite: Tell us what is broken: a page, your account, posting, or something else. A page URL helps but is optional.
ReportOther.listingUrlHint: Copy the address from your browser on the listing page.
ReportOther.siteUrlHint: If it is about a specific page, paste the URL. You can leave it empty for general issues.
ReportOther.detailsPlaceholderListing: What is wrong with this listing? Any detail helps moderators.
ReportOther.detailsPlaceholderSite: Describe the steps: what you clicked, any error message, device/browser.
ReportOther.successListing: We received your listing report. Moderators will review it.
ReportOther.successSite: We received your technical report. Thank you — we will look into it.
ReportOther.errorValidation: Check the fields: title at least 3 characters, valid listing URL (https) when reporting a listing, and a selected reason.
ReportOther.errorKind: Invalid report type. Please try again.

Publish.title: Post an ad
Publish.subtitle: Fill in the fields below.
Publish.editSubtitle: Update your ad and save changes.

Admin.title: Admin
Admin.subtitle: All listings (quick moderation).
Admin.feedbackSubtitle: Messages from the Contact page — registered users get an in-app notification; guests with an email may receive a reply by email if configured.
Admin.feedbackReplyPlaceholder: Write the reply the user will see…
Admin.feedbackLoadError: Couldn’t load feedback. Check the feedback / feedback_replies tables and database connectivity.
Admin.dashboardSubtitle: See what needs attention at a glance and jump into each area.
Admin.dashboardAttentionDesc: You have {count} pending report(s). Review the queue before marking reviewed or dismissed.
Admin.listingsSubtitle: Table with title, category and price ? open a listing or remove it.
Admin.usersSubtitle: Registered accounts, roles, and how many listings each user published.
Admin.supportSubtitle: All conversations from the Contact page — reply in the same thread, separate from listing messages.
Admin.supportFilterRecentHint: Open or pending tickets created in the last {days} days.
Admin.supportFilterUnansweredHint: Open or pending tickets with no moderator/admin message yet.
Admin.supportEmptyRecent: No recently opened tickets in this window.
Admin.supportEmptyUnanswered: No open tickets without a staff reply.
Admin.supportDbUnavailable: Support tables aren’t available. Run Prisma migrations on the server (e.g. npx prisma migrate deploy) and reload.
Admin.reportsSubtitle: Filter by status, read the reason, and act on the listing.
Admin.reportsSummaryHint: Pending reports should be handled first; you can delete a listing from any status.
Admin.complaintsSubtitle: All reports (listings and other content), with status and an optional message to the reporter after resolution.
Admin.complaintsHint: When you resolve a case, the reporter gets an in-app notification and an email (if Resend is configured).
Admin.resolutionNotePlaceholder: e.g. listing removed / no violation found?
Admin.confirmDeleteListingFromReport: Move this listing to trash? It can be restored from Admin → Deleted listings.
Admin.trashSubtitle: Soft-deleted ads. Restore to publish again, or permanently remove (irreversible).
Admin.trashLoadError: Couldn’t load the trash list. Check soft-delete migrations and server logs, then try again.
Admin.confirmPermanentDelete: Permanently delete this listing and related data? This cannot be undone.
Admin.logsLoadError: Couldn’t load the log. Check that the admin_logs table exists and the database is reachable.

Report.errorUnauthorized: Sign in to report an ad.
Report.errorOwn: You cannot report your own ad.

Favorites.title: Saved ads
Favorites.subtitle: Listings you saved.
Favorites.empty: No saved ads yet. Open an ad and tap Save.
Favorites.toggleError: Could not update. If this persists, the database may need updating (run prisma db push on the server).

ListingForm.categoryEmptyFilter: No matches ? try another word or go up a level.
ListingForm.title: Title
ListingForm.imagesHint: Minimum 1, maximum 8 URLs (one per line). You can upload files.
ListingForm.serverValidation: Please check the fields and try again.
ListingForm.serverPublishError: Could not publish. Please try again.

validation.errCategoryLeaf: Pick a final subcategory (e.g. Cars), not only the parent category.
validation.errPrice: Enter a whole number price greater than 0.
validation.errImages: Invalid image URLs or wrong count (1?8).
validation.errImagesRequired: Add at least one valid image URL per line.

AccountSettings.title: My account
AccountSettings.subtitle: Manage your profile, security, and preferences in one place.

profile.heading: Profile
profile.lead: Your public information and how others see you.
profile.avatarHint: Paste an image URL (HTTPS). Upload to Imgur, Cloudinary, etc.

security.heading: Security
security.oauthOnly: You signed in with Google or Facebook. Set a password from the email login flow only after linking, or use provider sign-in.
security.twoFactorHint: Extra verification when we add authenticator apps.
security.loginHistoryHint: Best-effort log from this app (not a full security audit).

account.heading: Account
account.lead: Export, sign out, or delete your account.
account.deleteWarning: This permanently removes your listings, messages, and favorites. This cannot be undone.
